description.text: Five Heroes of the ablockalypse now fight in this arena. One Cube and a Base.

ru.original: Five Heroes of the ablockalypse now fight in this arena. One Cube and a Base.
ru.translation: Пять Героев Апокалипсиса теперь сражаются на этой арене. Один Куб и База.

es.original: Five Heroes of the ablockalypse now fight in this arena. One Cube and a Base.
es.translation:
Enfrenta a los héroes del ablocalipsis.
Un generador y un núcleo.

de.original: Five Heroes of the ablockalypse now fight in this arena. One Cube and a Base.
de.translation: Ab jetzt kämpfen die fünf Helden der Ablockalypse in dieser Arena. Ein Generator und eine Basis.

fr.original: Five Heroes of the ablockalypse now fight in this arena. One Cube and a Base.
fr.translation: Le terrain idéal pour une lutte entre les cinq héros de l'ablocalypse. Un cube et une base.

pt.original: Five Heroes of the ablockalypse now fight in this arena. One Cube and a Base.
pt.translation: Cinco Heróis do Ablocalipse agora lutam nesta arena. Um Cubo e uma Base.
